# Synced from RYSEN — do not edit

These files are copied automatically from [ShaYmez/RYSEN](https://github.com/ShaYmez/RYSEN) by [`.github/workflows/sync-from-rysen.yml`](../.github/workflows/sync-from-rysen.yml).

| Satellite file | RYSEN source |
|----------------|--------------|
| `hotspot_proxy_v2.py` | `hotspot_proxy_v2_sc.py` |
| `proxy_db.py` | `proxy_db.py` |
| `proxy-SAMPLE.cfg` | `hotspot_proxy_v2_sc-SAMPLE.cfg` |

`tests/test_hotspot_proxy.py` is synced from `tests/test_hotspot_proxy.py` in RYSEN (imports adjusted to `hotspot_proxy_v2`).

Develop proxy logic in **RYSEN only**. Refresh via **Actions → Sync from RYSEN**, `repository_dispatch`, or the daily scheduled sync.

Current RYSEN commit: see [`.rysen-sha`](.rysen-sha).
